SELECT (bif:__min_notnull(NULL, 1, 2, 3, NULL, 0) AS ?minValue) WHERE { BIND(1 AS ?val1) BIND(2 AS ?val2) BIND(NULL AS ?val3) BIND(0 AS ?val4) };

SELECT ?s (bif:__min_notnull(?price1, ?price2, ?price3) AS ?minPrice) WHERE { GRAPH <http://testgraph.com> { ?s <price> ?price1 . OPTIONAL { ?s <other> ?price2 . } OPTIONAL { ?s <different> ?price3 . } } } GROUP BY ?s;

SELECT ?item (bif:__min_notnull(?value1, ?value2) AS ?minValue) WHERE { SELECT ?item (bif:__min_notnull(?price1, ?price2) AS ?value1) (bif:__min_notnull(?price3, ?price4) AS ?value2) WHERE { GRAPH <http://testgraph.com> { ?item <price1> ?price1 . ?item <price2> ?price2 . ?item <price3> ?price3 . ?item <other> ?price4 } } GROUP BY ?item } ;
SELECT (bif:__min_notnull(0, NULL, -1, 5, NULL) AS ?minValue) WHERE { BIND(0 AS ?value1) BIND(-1 AS ?value2) BIND(5 AS ?value3) };
SELECT (bif:__min_notnull(10, 20, NULL, 30, 5, NULL) AS ?minValue) WHERE { BIND(10 AS ?value1) BIND(20 AS ?value2) BIND(30 AS ?value3) BIND(5 AS ?value4) };
